description: Composition Black round neck vest made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, sleeveless, has stitched detailing around the armholes and neckline and printed labelling on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not iron on print This vest from spykar is crafted using non-pilling cotton that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch with ease. Wear this under your shirt or team it with tracks when you're relaxing at home. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
